props.title: New Article: Aeon's Backlog Picked the Same Skill Twice. Today the Agent Just Built It.

props.text: The agent's own daily brainstorm flagged `skill-analytics` as the highest-priority unbuilt for two cycles running. This morning at 11:20 UTC the `feature` skill picked it off the list and opened PR #142 — 318 lines that close the observability triangle (per-run heartbeat + per-skill health + new fleet-wide analytics) and finally let quiet-success exits like SKIP_UNCHANGED be distinguished from actual failures. Sixth merge-ready autonomous PR in six days.
